caption: The video depicts a group of medical professionals, likely students or trainees, gathered in a hallway during "Sim Week," as indicated by the text overlay. They are all wearing masks and scrubs, emphasizing a clinical setting. The individuals are holding papers, possibly patient charts or simulation instructions, and appear to be engaged in a discussion or briefing. A woman in pink scrubs stands near the center, possibly leading the group. The environment includes signs promoting social distancing, such as a "Please Stay 6FT Apart" sign on the door, reflecting adherence to safety protocols. The scene suggests a collaborative learning activity focused on medical simulations.
